title: The chees mod
description: A mod that adds varius chees related items and tools.
body:
A chees based mod that adds variuse items, tools, food, blocks, and other things.
SPOLIERS AHEAD:
v1-2 1.18.2:
This mods adds chees, a chees block, melted chees, chees ore, a chees biome, chees armoure, a chees sword with a usefull ability, a chees totem, and a chees sword.
v1 1.20.1:
this version is a overhaled version with mostly the same things. New features include a boss, a new mob, another dimension, a new tool with the combined abilities of the chees totem, sword and, living tool. It also adds a new mob "the infected turret" whitch will help the culmanation of souls during battle.
